package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for file_upload_validation_mixed_with_storage_write: Functions that validate upload metadata and also persist the upload in the same boundary step.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule034NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule034NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule034NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario034Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule034NegativeService, input Rule034NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
